announcements.title: Momentum Bound Announcement!
body: Momentum Bound is now available to play!

announcements.title: Touhou But Peak Announcement!
body: Touhou But Peak is now available to play!

announcements.title: Everdew Update!
body: - Fixed a bug which caused animals that are dead to respawn after load
- Top down sprite sorting should now be more reliable
- Reverted amount of days Pigs, Cows and Sheeps survive without food back to 5 days
- Re-added the tooltip for the seed buttons
